subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee be My salutations! Thy missive which thou didst dispatch unto this servant was laid before Our presence, and from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک سلامی نامه آنجناب که بعبد حاضر ارسال نمودی امام وجه عرض شد و از
subcodes.subjects: @pioneering; travel teaching, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
